title: [ipv6_addr.c:243] lichen_log_link_local_from_eui64 ll_addr_out not zeroed on failure
description: Function: lichen_log_link_local_from_eui64. Postcondition: If lichen_eui64_to_iid fails (line 255-259), the function returns error but ll_addr_out is not written to. A caller with uninitialized ll_addr_out would have garbage on error. The function should either document that ll_addr_out is only written on success, or zero it on all exit paths. Current behavior matches typical error-then-return patterns but could surprise callers. Priority 3 - documentation issue.
close_reason: Fixed: zero ll_addr_out on all failure paths in lichen_log_link_local_from_eui64
